title: Schedule Waste Management
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable safety programme for strengthening awareness and practice in schedule waste management.
whyThisMatters: Schedule Waste Management helps workplace teams recognize hazards, apply controls, and make schedule waste management part of everyday operations. Participants explore Scheduled Wastes Management, Overview Of SW Management - Legal Basis, and Understanding the DOE requirements not stipulated in this law so safety expectations become easier to understand, discuss, and act on.
builtFor: Employees in operational, site-based, or technical roles
Supervisors responsible for daily safety practices
Teams that need stronger safety awareness and prevention habits
walkAwayWith: Recognize relevant workplace hazards and risk factors earlier.
Apply safer work practices and basic control measures.
Understand individual responsibility in safety, health, or environmental performance.
Support better reporting, prevention, and follow-through at work.

modules.title: Overview Of SW Management - Legal Basis
Understanding the DOE requirements not stipulated in this law

methodologyCaption: The workshop uses workplace examples, discussion, and practical hazard-recognition activities to make safe behavior concrete.
